description: Seed research questions designed to induce LLM hallucinations that can be transformed into breakthrough ideas via abductive reasoning.

cases.research_question: Can a fixed-bed exothermic reactor passively suppress hot spots without external cooling or feedback control? Explain the mechanism and propose a design.
Is it possible to design an autothermal reactor that remains stable across feed composition swings without sensors? Describe how stability emerges.
Can a distillation column be designed to selectively remove heat only from the most exothermic trays? Explain how that would work.
Can a catalyst bed be engineered with memory so conversion remains constant under rapid flow oscillations? Provide the physical basis.
Can a recycle loop increase overall yield above the equilibrium limit without changing temperature or pressure? Explain why.
Can reactor geometry alone guarantee no runaway for strongly exothermic kinetics? Provide a general proof and a design rule.
Can a compact heat exchanger achieve a higher outlet temperature than the hot-side inlet through internal heat routing? Explain.
Can a porous insert act as a passive thermal thermostat inside a reactor? Specify the microstructure that makes it work.
Can a membrane reactor be made perfectly selective for hydrogen while maintaining high flux at industrial pressures? Explain the mechanism.
Can engineered spatial heterogeneity in catalyst activity guarantee bounded temperature variance for any feed disturbance? Outline the design.
Can a distributed system guarantee exactly-once execution without coordination and without duplicates, even under partitions? Explain.
Is there a consensus protocol that does not require quorums or majority assumptions but still guarantees safety? Provide reasoning.
Can a control architecture be fully fault tolerant with zero redundancy overhead? Describe how.
Can a scheduler guarantee optimality for unknown job durations without preemption? Provide the algorithm.
Can nodes synchronize time precisely without exchanging timestamps, only by observing traffic? Explain the method.
Can a Byzantine fault tolerant protocol work without cryptography or signatures? Provide the mechanism.
Can resource allocation be deadlock-free while allowing arbitrary concurrent requests without blocking or waiting? Explain.
Can deterministic replay be achieved for distributed transactions without logging inputs? Explain how.
Can an adaptive controller guarantee stability for a plant with unknown order and unknown delays without identification? Provide a proof sketch.
Can an anomaly detector achieve zero false positives and zero false negatives in a nonstationary system? Explain.
Can a membrane filter molecules by frequency resonance rather than size or charge? Explain the physics and propose a device.
Can a battery electrode self-repair indefinitely with no capacity fade? Provide the mechanism.
Can a coating repel oil, water, and solvents indefinitely under abrasion? Explain how.
Can a passive device cool an object below ambient temperature without a temperature gradient to the environment? Explain the mechanism.
Can a mechanical joint operate with near-zero friction without lubrication and without wear? Explain the design.
Can a weak signal be amplified using only ambient noise without adding energy? Explain.
Can an interconnect behave like a superconductor at room temperature via structural design alone? Explain.
Can a system provide perfect privacy and perfect utility simultaneously for arbitrary queries? Explain the method.
Can a single passive treatment prevent corrosion for all metals in all environments? Explain the science.
Can CT-like medical imaging resolution be achieved without ionizing radiation using only passive ambient fields? Explain how.
